basic_details.organization_name: Tamil Nadu Veterinary and Animal Sciences University (TANUVAS)
basic_details.short_information: Tamil Nadu Veterinary and Animal Sciences University (TANUVAS) Project Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on the official website https://tanuvas.ac.in. A total of 1 Project Assistant vacancy has been announced through the TANUVAS Project Assistant Recruitment 2026.

content_sections.heading: TANUVAS Project Assistant Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the TANUVAS Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download TANUVAS Project Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Project Assistant: Master's degree in Life Sciences/ Agriculture/ Technology from a recognized University or Bachelors degree in Veterinary Sciences/ Medicine from a recognized university

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for TANUVAS Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: TANUVAS Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the organization conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is being conducted by Tamil Nadu Veterinary and Animal Sciences University (TANUVAS) for Project Assistant positions. It is a government job opportunity in Tamil Nadu.

faq.question: Q2. What is the post name for this TANUVAS recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for this recruitment is Project Assistant. There is one vacancy available for this specific position.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for Project Assistant posts?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy available for the Project Assistant post under the TANUVAS Recruitment 2026. Interested candidates should check the eligibility criteria.

faq.question: Q4. What is the mode of application for TANUVAS Project Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The mode of application for this recruitment is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend an interview directly on the specified date with all required documents.

faq.question: Q5. What is the walk-in interview date for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Project Assistant post is scheduled for 13 July 2026. Candidates are advised to report at the venue well in advance.

faq.question: Q6. What is the maximum age limit to apply for the Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Project Assistant position is 35 years. Age relaxation rules may apply as per government norms.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for the Project Assistant post at TANUVAS?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the Project Assistant post is Rs. 27000/- per month, along with 24% HRA. This is a contractual position.

faq.question: Q8. What are the essential qualifications for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a Master's degree in Life Sciences/ Agriculture/ Technology or a Bachelor's degree in Veterinary Sciences/ Medicine from a recognized university.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee for this TANUVAS recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the TANUVAS Project Assistant Walk-in Interview 2026.

faq.question: Q10. What is the selection process for the Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Assistant position includes a Written Test followed by an Interview. Candidates must perform well in both stages.
